nasb.text: the latter do it out of love, knowing that I am appointed for the defense of the gospel;

esv.text: The latter do it out of love, knowing that I am put here for the defense of the gospel.

cnv.text: 這些人是出於愛心，知道我是派來為福音辯護的。

ccb.text: 后者是出于爱心，知道我是上帝派来维护福音的。

csbs.text: 后者是出于爱，知道我是为辩护福音而受委派的；
